2: And break me in pieces with words?
3: Ye are not ashamed that that ye make yourselves strange to me.
5: And plead against me my reproach:
6: And hath compassed me with his net.
7: I cry aloud, but there is there is no judgment.
8: And he hath set darkness in my paths.
9: And taken the crown from from my head.
10: And mine hope hath he removed like a tree.
11: And he counteth me unto him as one of one of his enemies.
12: And encamp round about my tabernacle.
13: And mine acquaintance are verily estranged from me.
14: My kinsfolk have failed, and my familiar friends have forgotten me.
15: I am an alien in their sight.
16: I intreated him with my mouth.
17: Though I intreated for the children's sake sake of mine own body.
18: I arose, and they spake against me.
19: And they whom I loved are turned against me.
20: And I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.
21: For the hand of God hath touched me.
22: And are not satisfied with my flesh?
23: Oh that they were printed in a book!
25: And that that he shall stand at the latter day day upon the earth:
26: Yet in my flesh shall I see God:
27: Though Though my reins be consumed within me.
28: Seeing the root of the matter is found in me?
29: That ye may know there is there is a judgment.
